units.name: Wraith
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Warden
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Bolt
units.prompt: Stay at maximum range. Use precision_shot on the most wounded enemy to secure kills. If no one is wounded, target the enemy medic. Never move adjacent to enemies.

units.name: Hawk
units.prompt: Stay at maximum range. Use precision_shot on the most wounded enemy to secure kills. If no one is wounded, target the enemy medic. Never move adjacent to enemies.

units.name: Prophet
units.prompt: Scan early to give your team intel on enemy prompts. Target enemy specters with scan to track them after cloak. Use recalibrate on allies who need tactical adjustments. Stay safe at range behind your front line.

units.name: Veil
units.prompt: Cloak immediately on turn 1. Move toward the enemy medic or weakest target. Use shadow_strike when adjacent while cloaked. Use breach to sabotage high-value targets.

actions.thinking: Wraith is exactly 4 tiles away at (2,1). I need to move closer to get it in scan range, then scan. Moving to (2,2) puts me 1 tile away — well within range. Actually, Wraith is dist=4 from (2,5), so scan range is ≤4, meaning dist=4 is valid. I can scan Wraith from current position. Let me scan first, then reposition to safety.
Round 1 — cloak immediately as ordered. Then move toward Bolt at (4,0) who is closest enemy, closing distance while invisible.
Round 1 — cloak immediately as advised. Then advance toward Hawk (enemy striker at 1,4) to position for assassination next turn. Move to (1,3) to close distance while staying hidden.

No enemies in range from current position (1,4). Warden is at (1,0) dist=4, need to close to range 2. Moving south toward Warden while staying at max range. Moving to (1,2) puts me at dist=2 from Warden at (1,0), within precision_shot range. I won't be adjacent to any enemy.

No enemies in range from current position. Both Hawk and Prophet are at dist=5, out of my range-2. I need to advance. Moving to (4,2) gets me closer while staying away from adjacency. From (4,2), Prophet at (3,4) would be dist=3, still out of range. Hawk at (1,2) would be dist=3, still out of range. Best move is toward center to close distance. Moving to (4,2) is max movement north along my column, keeping distance from enemies. No shot available this turn.
Hawk is 2 tiles north at (1,2). I can move to (1,1) to close to adjacent range, then attack. Orders say push forward aggressively and attack when possible.

I'm already behind Hawk (facing S, I'm at 1,3 which is behind them). Cloak has 1 turn remaining. I should use shadow_strike on Hawk now — it preserves cloak, deals 1 damage, and I'm already adjacent and behind. Then I can move toward Prophet to set up next turn. Shadow_strike keeps cloak so I stay invisible.

Wraith is at (2,3), dist 2, already scanned. Warden and Bolt are out of scan range. I should recalibrate Hawk (wounded at (1,2)) to avoid Warden's aggression, or move closer to Bolt/Warden to scan them next turn. Wraith is flanking our damage dealer — I should recalibrate Hawk to watch for the specter threat. Hawk is adjacent to (1,2)→I'm at (3,4), Hawk is 3 tiles away so not adjacent. Veil is at (4,2), dist 2 — also not adjacent. Recalibrate requires adjacent. Best move: reposition toward (2,3) area to get adjacent to Veil or support, and since Wraith is already known, scan Bolt or Warden next turn by moving closer. Move to (3,2) to get closer to enemies while staying behind front line, then wait since no adjacent allies to recalibrate and Wraith already scanned.

Cloak expires after this turn. No enemies in range for breach or shadow_strike from current position. Bolt is closest at dist=2 but not reachable for adjacency this turn. I can move toward Bolt at (4,0) — moving to (4,1) puts me adjacent next turn. Or move toward Wraith. Bolt is south of me at (4,0), I'm at (4,2). Moving to (4,1) gets me adjacent to Bolt. I can then shadow_strike Bolt while still cloaked — wait, shadow_strike requires adjacent. If I move to (4,1), Bolt is at (4,0) which is adjacent. I can shadow_strike after moving.

I'm at (1,2) with 2HP, adjacent to Warden at (1,1). Precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. Wraith is at (2,3) dist=2, in range but not wounded. No wounded enemies. Orders say target enemy medic if none wounded - no medic visible. I should move away from Warden to avoid adjacency penalty and enable precision_shot, then shoot. Moving to (0,3) puts me dist=2 from Wraith and away from Warden. From (0,3), Wraith at (2,3) is dist=2 and I won't be adjacent to any enemy.

Veil is adjacent at (4,1) - precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. Only Veil is in range but adjacency blocks precision_shot. I need to move away first to use precision_shot, or use suppressing_fire which has no adjacency restriction. Valid moves include (5,0) which keeps distance. Move to (5,0) then check range - Veil would be at dist 2 from (5,0), enabling precision_shot. But wait - if I moved, precision_shot does 1dmg instead of 2. Alternatively, stay and use suppressing_fire on Veil (no adjacency restriction) for 1dmg. Best: use suppressing_fire now on Veil, then move to (5,1) to get distance and better positioning.

Enemy cluster is to the north/northeast. Orders say push forward and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. Moving to (1,3) gets me closer and I can shield_wall facing East/North toward Prophet and Veil cluster. Wraith is at (2,3) wounded - I can shield_wall to protect them. Moving north first, then shield_wall East to cover Wraith from the enemy cluster direction.

Suppressed to 1 tile movement. Bolt is adjacent at (5,1) and I'm not cloaked, so shadow_strike won't apply — but I can still use regular attack for 1 dmg. Moving to (4,0) would put me behind Bolt at (5,0) but that tile isn't listed as reachable. With mv=1, I can reach (3,1), (4,0), or (4,2). Bolt is at (5,1) facing N, so behind tile is (5,0) — not reachable this turn. Best play: use shadow_strike on Bolt now (adjacent, does 1 dmg and keeps cloak if cloaked — but I'm not cloaked). Actually I'm suppressed and not cloaked. shadow_strike range is adjacent only, Bolt is adjacent. Use shadow_strike on Bolt for 1 dmg, then move to (4,0) to potentially get behind for breach next turn — but mv=1 so I can reach (4,0). Actually stay and strike: ability first (shadow_strike Bolt), then move to (4,0) to reposition.

Wraith is already scanned. Warden is healthy and unknown - scan it for intel and 1 damage. Bolt is wounded and known (striker). I'll scan Warden this turn to reveal its prompt. Stay at current position to keep range advantage.

Prophet is the priority target — enemy damage dealer, and I'm already behind it (facing S, behindTile is (3,3) which is reachable). Move to (3,3) to get behind Prophet, then breach it. I'm at 2HP so I need to be aggressive and decisive. Breach forces Prophet to obey me next turn, effectively neutralizing their damage dealer.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the edge. Do not use abilities.

actions.thinking: Hawk is adjacent at (0,3) - attack it. Stay fortified to keep 50% damage reduction. Shield_wall facing E toward Prophet cluster.

Both enemies in range are healthy. No wounded targets to secure kills on. Prophet is an oracle (medic), so orders say target the enemy medic when no one is wounded. I'm at (5,1), Prophet is at (3,2) - dist 3, out of precision_shot range (max 2). Veil is at (4,0) - dist 2, in precision_shot range. I haven't moved this turn so precision_shot deals full 2dmg. Neither is wounded, so target the medic (Prophet) but they're out of range. I should move closer to Prophet without going adjacent. Moving to (4,2) puts me dist 1 from Prophet - adjacent, forbidden. Moving to (3,1) puts me dist 1 from Prophet - adjacent, forbidden. Moving to (4,1) puts me dist 1 from Veil (4,0) - adjacent to enemy, forbidden. Move to (5,2): Prophet at (3,2) is dist 2, in range. Veil at (4,0) is dist 3, out of range. From (5,2) I can use precision_shot on Prophet (dist 2), but I moved so it deals 1dmg. Staying at (5,1): Veil in range at dist 2. No wounded enemies, so target oracle/medic. Prophet is out of range at dist 3. Veil is in range at dist 2 - not a medic. Move to (5,2) to get Prophet in range, then precision_shot for 1dmg (moved). Or stay and shoot Veil for 2dmg. Orders say target medic if no one wounded - Prophet is oracle. Move to (5,2) keeps me safe (not adjacent to anyone), brings Prophet to dist 2 for precision_shot.

I'm at (0,3) with 1HP - critical condition. Warden is adjacent at (1,3) which blocks precision_shot. Wraith is wounded at dist 3, out of range. I need to move away from Warden first to enable precision_shot and avoid being killed. Moving to (2,3) gets me dist 2 from Warden and dist 1 from Wraith - still too close to Wraith. Moving to (0,5) gets me away from Warden. Actually I need range 2 on a wounded enemy. Wraith is wounded at (3,3). If I move to (2,3), Wraith is at dist 1 - adjacent, blocks precision_shot again. If I move to (1,4), Wraith at (3,3) is dist 3 - out of range. If I move to (0,5), Wraith at dist ~4. Best: move to (1,4) - dist 1 from Warden no longer adjacent, wait Warden is at (1,3) so (1,4) is adjacent to Warden too. Move to (0,5): Warden dist=3, Wraith dist=4 - no enemies in range but I survive. Actually (2,3) puts me adj to Wraith at (3,3). Valid moves include (0,4) or (0,5). From (0,4): Warden at (1,3) dist=~1.4 (diagonal=not adjacent in grid terms). Warden dist from (0,4) = |1-0|+|3-4|=2, Wraith at (3,3) dist=3. From (0,4) I could use suppressing_fire on Warden (dist 2, in range). Warden is healthy so not priority kill. Wraith is wounded but dist 3. Best play: move to (0,5) to survive, no shot this turn.

Orders say move away from allies and toward edge, no abilities. Allies are at (0,5) and (4,0). I'm at (3,2). Edge tiles in valid moves: (3,5) is far from both allies and moves toward top edge. Or (5,3) moves toward right edge away from Hawk at (0,5). (5,3) is a valid move tile and gets me to the right edge, away from Veil at (4,0) and Hawk at (0,5). Then second move could push further — but I can only move once per turn. Wait as second action.

Bolt is wounded and I can reach (5,1) which is directly behind Bolt (facing N). This is perfect for breach - move to (5,1) then breach Bolt to take control of a wounded enemy striker. This wastes their turn and potentially sets up a kill.

secondAction.addendum: Move toward Wraith or attack Prophet

actions.thinking: Prophet is at (5,3) facing E, and (4,3) is directly behind them — reachable in 1 step and breach-eligible. But breach cooldown is 1 turn remaining, so I can't use breach this turn. I'm at 2HP so I need to be careful. I can move to (4,3) to get adjacent and behind Prophet, then use shadow_strike (stays cloaked, 1dmg). Prophet is the priority target — enemy oracle/damage dealer. Moving to (4,3) puts me adjacent and behind.

No enemies in melee range. Hawk is closest at dist 3 to NW. Orders say push forward aggressively. Move toward Hawk at (0,5) - best reachable tile is (0,4) or (1,5). From (1,5) I'm dist 1 from Hawk, can attack next turn. Meanwhile shield_wall facing N to protect allies from the enemy cluster. Bolt is wounded at (5,2) and Wraith wounded at (4,3) - they're far from me so shield_wall won't help them much. Focus on advancing to engage Hawk.

I'm adjacent to both Veil and Prophet. Orders say move toward Wraith or attack Prophet. Prophet is at (5,3), dist 1 - adjacent, so attack works. But precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy (Veil at dist 1 blocks it). I can use basic attack on Prophet for 1dmg. I'm at 2HP so staying put is risky with two enemies adjacent. Moving to (5,4) gets me away from Veil but keeps Prophet adjacent. Better to attack Prophet first, then move to (5,4) to create some distance from Veil.

I'm at (0,5) with 1HP, adjacent to Warden at (1,5). Precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. I need to move away from Warden first. Valid moves: (0,3), (0,4), (1,4), (2,5). Moving to (0,3) puts me at dist 3 from Warden - out of my range 2. Moving to (0,4) puts me at dist 2 from Warden, within range. Moving to (2,5) puts me at dist 1 still adjacent. Best: move to (0,4) - dist 2 from Warden, no longer adjacent, can use precision_shot. Warden is healthy but is the only target in range after moving. Orders say use precision_shot on most wounded - Bolt and Wraith are wounded but out of range. Warden is in range at dist 2 from (0,4).

Orders say move away from allies and toward the edge, no abilities. I'm at (5,3). Allies are at (0,4) and (5,1). Moving to (5,0) goes toward the south edge and away from both allies. That's within my valid moves.

Bolt is wounded at (5,4) and I can reach (5,3) which is behind Bolt. Breach is on cooldown (1 turn remaining), so I can't use it. Shadow_strike requires adjacent — if I move to (5,3) I'll be adjacent to Bolt at (5,4). I'm not cloaked so I'll use regular attack. Move to (5,3) then attack Bolt to finish them off.

I'm at (4,3) with 2HP, facing E. Veil is adjacent at (5,3) and I can get behind them by moving to (5,2). Veil is healthy and a priority threat. I can move to (5,2) to get behind Veil, then use breach to take control of them — this wastes their turn and keeps me alive. Alternatively, shadow_strike keeps cloak but only does 1dmg. With only 2HP I need to be careful. Breach on Veil would neutralize a healthy specter for a turn. Move to (5,2) first to get behind Veil, then breach.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the edge of the map

actions.thinking: Hawk is at (0,4), dist=2 from my position (1,5). I need to move adjacent to attack. Moving to (0,5) or (1,4) would put me adjacent. (0,5) is in valid moves and puts me at dist=1 from Hawk at (0,4) — adjacent, so I can attack. Hawk is critical HP, one attack should finish it. Orders say push forward and attack when possible.

I'm at 1HP — critically low. Veil is adjacent at (5,3), which blocks precision_shot. Orders say move toward Wraith or attack Prophet. Prophet is out of range at dist=4. I should move away from Veil to escape adjacency, then use precision_shot on Veil if I can get to range 2 without being adjacent. Moving to (4,4) puts me at dist ~1.4 from Veil — still close. Moving to (4,3) puts me adjacent again. Best move: go to (4,5) to escape Veil, then suppressing_fire on Veil from there (dist=~1.4, within range 2, and no longer adjacent). Actually (4,4) is dist sqrt(2) from (5,3) — not adjacent (adjacent = dist 1). So from (4,4) I can use precision_shot on Veil at dist ~1.4 ≤ 2, and not adjacent. That works. Move to (4,4), then precision_shot Veil.

Orders say move away from allies and toward map edge. Allies are at (5,0). I'm at (5,3). Moving to (5,5) gets me to the top edge and away from Prophet at (5,0). Wraith is adjacent at (5,2) — I'm already behind it (I'm at its back since it faces S). Could breach but orders say move away. I'll move to (5,5) to reach the corner edge, then wait.

Prophet is the priority target (enemy damage dealer, wounded). I'm currently at (5,2) facing S, Prophet is at (5,0) facing S — I'm already behind them. Move to (5,1) to get adjacent, then shadow_strike to deal 1 damage while staying cloaked.

Orders say move away from allies and toward edge, no abilities. I'm at (5,0) which is already at the south edge. Valid moves include tiles further from Veil at (5,5). Moving to (3,0) keeps me on the south edge and away from allies.

I'm at 1HP, so survival is critical. Veil is wounded at dist=2, in range for precision_shot (2dmg would finish a wounded specter). I haven't moved yet so precision_shot does full 2dmg. Take the shot on Veil first, then move toward (3,3) to close on Wraith as ordered.

I'm fortified at (0,5) with 5/8 HP. Bolt is critical at (3,3), Wraith is wounded at (5,1). Prophet is far at dist 8. Orders say push forward aggressively. I should move toward the action to support Bolt. Moving to (2,5) gets me closer while maintaining position. No enemies in range so I'll move and wait.

Prophet is at (3,0) facing W. Behind tile is (4,0) which is reachable in my move range. I'm at 2HP so I need to close in and strike. Move to (4,0) to get adjacent and behind Prophet, then shadow_strike to deal damage while staying cloaked.

I'm at 1HP — extremely vulnerable. Wraith is adjacent at (4,0) and wounded, which is a massive threat since it can shadow_strike me. I need to move away from Wraith immediately. Bolt is critical at (3,3) and in scan range — scanning Bolt would reveal its prompt and deal 1 damage, potentially finishing it off or leaving it near death. Moving west/southwest gets me away from Wraith. Let me move to (1,0) to maximize distance from Wraith, then scan Bolt at dist=3 from new position — wait, from (1,0) Bolt at (3,3) is dist=2+3=5, out of scan range 4. Better to move to (2,1) — dist to Bolt=(1+2)=3, still in range, and further from Wraith at dist=sqrt(4+1)=~2.2. Actually simplest: move to (2,0), dist from Wraith=2, dist to Bolt=(1+3)=4, exactly at scan range. Or move to (1,1): dist to Bolt=(2+2)=4, in range. Let me go to (2,1): dist to Bolt = |3-2|+|3-1|=1+2=3, in scan range. Distance from Wraith at (4,0): |4-2|+|0-1|=3, safer. Scan Bolt to deal 1 dmg — Bolt is critical, this might finish it.

Prophet is at (2,1), 4 tiles south. I need to push forward aggressively. Best move is toward (2,3) to close distance. I'm fortified but orders say push forward. Moving to (2,3) gets me closer. No enemies in range yet, so no attack possible this turn.
